name: Auntie Yuan Duck Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Dressing: Mustard, salt, white pepper, sugar, finely chopped garlic, soy sauce, chicken stock, rice vinegar, vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
- Preheat oven to 400°F. Rub duck cavity with soy sauce, salt, and pepper. Place on rack in roasting pan. Brush honey-vinegar mixture over duck. Roast until crisp and golden, about 1 hour. Cool.
- Remove skin and meat from duck breasts. Reserve 1 cup; use remaining for another recipe.
- For Dressing: Mix all ingredients in small bowl. Set aside.
- Heat oil in wok to 450°F. Carefully add rice sticks, cook until puffed. Turn with skimmer, cook other side. Remove, drain on paper towels. Break up noodles and arrange on plates. Scatter lettuce over noodles and top with reserved duck. Garnish with scallions, cilantro. Stir dressing, drizzle over salad. Sprinkle with sesame seeds. Serve.
